asset.title: L1 Read
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates an AI agent executing a read-only audit of a financial sheet, showing step-by-step progress from goal to completion without modifying data.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI highlights rows as they are read, though the final output of the 'say' action is not fully displayed.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full sequence from step 0 to 7, demonstrating the before, action, and final state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode layout with clear row highlights, though highly minimalist.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and versioned artifact story of NodeRoom.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a direct capture of a trace replay or execution log.

legibility.evidence: Text and step indicators are readable, though the bottom status text is slightly small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial auditing and verifying AI read-only constraints.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents step-by-step execution without overclaiming capabilities.

observedEvidence: Row highlighting corresponding to active read operations
Status bar showing specific agent actions like 'list_artifacts' and 'reads r_ni_variance'

defects.observed: The 'say' steps (5/7 and 6/7) do not show the actual text output generated by the AI in the main panel.
defects.fix: Display the generated text or report summary in the main view during the 'say' steps.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch a NodeRoom AI agent safely audit and read financial variance data step-by-step without altering any underlying values.
